After seeing your message in WhatsApp,I made a phone call to watch woman.It is not fair to deal with customers.The relationship should be fair and healthy.Dont entertain reckless people as delivary associates.

seeing the item.

The item is very nice.Color is also good.
Expandable.We can keep wet cloths like towel
Two other zips are useful to keep medicines.Soap box etc.
I am happy with purchase.
Instruct the delivary associate to handover to party,when he is at home.If I were out of station
I give instruction to hand over to watch man/woman.OTP method is the best way to solve this kind of problems.
Thank You.

title: 1.0 out of 5 stars
body:
This is not polycarbonate material. Don't be fooled by the false claims. This is not what premium build quality looks like. At most, it's a blend of ABS (which is cheaper and lower quality) with maybe a little bit of polycarbonate mixed in. Real polycarbonate luggage doesn't come in 7 to 8 thousand rupees anyway. It's more expensive.

Also, not user friendly. The telescopic handle is too short. So I can't fit a backpack onto it for easy carrying. Dissapointed in Safari, but I guess every company is doing the same these days. Selling lower quality ABS luggage and calling it polycarbonate. Since actual polycarbonate luggage would be expensive and not affordable for most people.

My only gripe is why lie about it, and cheat innocent customers who don't know which is which?

Misleading people is really shameful.
